title: clevelandia beldingii
intro: Clevelandia beldingii, also known as Belding's coralroot, is a rare, terrestrial orchid found in the coastal fog belt of California and Oregon. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its unique alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Clevelandia beldingii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Clevelandia beldingii include infusions and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
